§6RF Lux§f

§aRedstone-Controlled Lights for configurable, automated lighting!§f
The §9RF Lux§f mod provides configurable lighting options with optional §bredstone§f control, perfect for automation setups and clean technical layouts.

§6Lighting Tiers & Power Usage§f:
§b• Level 0 Light§f: Requires §ano RF power§f (§e0 RF/t§f) and emits light equivalent to standard §bGlowstone§f.
§b• Level 1 Light§f: Illuminates a larger area, consuming a low §c5 RF/t§f from its internal §e10,000 RF§f buffer.
§b• Level 2 Light§f: Illuminates the maximum area, consuming §c20 RF/t§f.

§6Forms & Customization§f:
§b• Two Form Factors§f: Available in a §bFlat (panel)§f variant or a §bFull Block§f variant.
§b• Five Colors§f: Each variant supports §65 different colors§f, allowing flexible integration into both functional builds and clean technical layouts.
